name: financial-decision-navigator
description: Decision-first financial planning workflows for retirement, home ownership, and marriage fund questions.

interface.shortDescription: Structure financial questions into choices, scenarios, and action plans.
interface.longDescription: Financial Decision Navigator helps users frame major life-finance decisions before discussing products. It supports retirement, home ownership, marriage fund, scenario analysis, and behavior-centered spending insight workflows.
defaultPrompt: 지금 집을 사야 할지 기다려야 할지 의사결정 관점에서 정리해줘.
결혼 자금을 어떻게 준비할지 실행 계획으로 바꿔줘.
